reviews.comment:
Renovada playa carga combustible, entras y salís volando. Hasta te lavan el parabrisas con una sonrisa... Genial

(Translated by Google)
The newly renovated beach is great for refueling; you're in and out in a flash. They even wash your windshield with a smile... Awesome!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11465332764445308403/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBNHFhczB3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Quedo muy linda despues de la remodelacion pero la atencion es un desastre en especial la de una mujer de pelo negro que es un desastre y tiene un humor podrido.

(Translated by Google)
It looks very nice after the remodeling, but the service is a disaster, especially from a black-haired woman who is a disaster and has a rotten temper.
